feed.title: SAP Community - NW ABAP Monitoring Tools
feed.subtitle: NW ABAP Monitoring Tools Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Rolling Calendar week based on current date in 4 different partition
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have a requirement where it has to fetch the data from Current day - 56 till Year end week(53rd week).

From Week : Current Date - 56( last 8 weeks)( Condition is if the From Week goes to the previous Year, then we will consider the 1st week of current year)
To Week   : Year End week(53rd Week) 
Example 1 : If the current date is 02.02.2023 , since the Current Date - 56 goes to the previous year, we will consider the 1st week of the current year.
           and To Week will be 202353
Example 2 : If the current date is 07.11.2023, the from Week is 07.11.2023 - 56 = 202320 
                                                   To Week                      = 202353

AS IS : Currently we have one select statement which is pulling all the records with the above from and to week filter. Since the volume of the transaction is very high( we are getting dump while fetching these many records in single shot).

TO BE : We want to split the above select statement in 4 partition( a kind of rolling partition ), so that each partition will get the same number of weeks. Below is the example scenario

Could someone help me in how to get to achieve this in ABAP. Any input will be greatly appreciated.

Regards,

Praveen.

entry.title: Why Can't I View the Table Maintenance
entry.content:
Heyy Everyone ,

I created a table from se11 .

I then created the maintenance and wanted to view it .

When I want to view it from Sm30 TCode, I can't even see the columns of the table.

I would appreciate your help, thank you very much.

entry.title: USE ATC to check customizing request
entry.content:
Hello

We have implemented the ATC server and it works correctly.

From the standard checks till some specific developments.

We would like to propose an enhancement about ATC

We think than the ATC tool could be used as well to check the customizing request to prevent the modification into some standards customizing tables.

By example, some functional process could be defined and cost a lot time and regression tests if some modification are done into, without the approval of the business owners.

I do not see any check currently possible into customizing requests, I propose to add this possbility through the ATC tool.

entry.title: ABAP SQL Monitor - Request entry point is "driving" SQL statements
entry.content:
Dear SAP community,

I was looking for some document describing usage of SQL monitor. I have found out lots of information on blog here , but still i have some unanswered questions.

In SAP Note 3242700, there should be a link to some best practices document, but the URL is pointing to "Content unavailable".

So for my question, firstly we have to understand this information:

In the context of the SQL Monitor the term “request entry point” is used to describe one of two things:

  • A process that is initiated directly by a user such as calling a transaction, requesting a URL or executing a report.
  • A process triggered from the outside of the system such as a remote function call.

Lets enter SQL Monitor >

In this view, aggregation by request:

Question 1: I can see that Y0CS_RET_LUK is having value 4 in column "DB Statements", which should mean that this Request Entry Point (type Batch Job) was executing 4 different SQL statements - right?

Question 2: Going through the drilldown (clicking on value 4), i can see that Y0CS_RET_LUK was ?executing? / ?has relevant? 4 different SQL statements (I assume that "ABAP Source Code Fragment" is the exact SQL statement that is being executed by relevant Request Entry Point.):

What is the difference between Y0FC_BNT and Y0CS_RET_LUK, how are they relevant? Those are two different objects. The confusion got worse when i have created SWLT report:

Static check Findings (lower right part) is reporting an issue in SELECT for FORM OBJNUM_GET_FOR_S which is part of SAPLY0FC_BNT (object Y0FC_BNT).

In SQL Monitor Results (lower left part), i can see a list of Request Entry Points, and Y0CS_RET_LUK is on first place, with the SQL:

"SELECT VKONT INTO TABLE LT_VKONT FROM FKKVKP WHERE GPART EQ IV_GPART AND STDBK IN LR_BUKRS." - This SQL is in SQL monitor relevant to Y0FC_BNT. After analyzing the code of Y0CS_RET_LUK, this SQL is not being executed. Y0CS_RET_LUK is not using Y0FC_BNT object or include LY0FC_BNTU04.

Question 3: So what is the recommendation of this SWLT run and how to interpret it?

If we use the Static check findings and we optimize the SQL as recommended here:

What would be the outcome ? From my confused point of view, we would optimize SAPLY0FC_BNT, not Y0CS_RET_LUK performance. So how is this optimization relevant to Y0CS_RET_LUK and all the other request entry points? How are all those request entry points related to SQL "SELECT VKONT INTO TABLE LT_VKONT...." ?

Does it mean that during execution of Y0CS_RET_LUK, it somehow executes this SQL statement even if its not part of the ABAP code of this specific report/job? ..

Best Regards

entry.title: Where can i see the output of Background Job containing program which uses Call method for Output.
entry.content:
Hi.

As mentioned in the question my requirement is, that my ABAP Program does not contain any variant instead, it calls for the other programs to get the output. Also, it contains multiple programs which leads to multiple outputs. So if I Run it manually I get the output one after the other.

But I want to schedule this program as a background job. So if I normally schedule the programs as a background job, I can see their output as a spool request.

I have tried scheduling this program as a background job, and it shows that the job is completed. But unlike other background jobs that contain programs with variants, this doesn't show any spool requests generated.

It says the job is complete. So if the job is complete the program output should be stored somewhere in the SAP server. I've checked in SP01 too. It shows the same result. There is no Spool Generated. I just want to know where the outputs of the scheduled background jobs are stored in SAP even when there are no variants used and the program itself can get its own output using the call method. Can someone please help me with this? I have been looking out for almost a week now. 😞

Thanks in Advance.
I really Appreciate it.

entry.title: Is there a way to extract the list of tcodes in profile SAP_ALL or IDES_DEVELOP?
entry.content:
Hi.

Is there any way to extract the list of tcodes these profiles contain? If yes can anyone tell me how do i do that?

Thanks, Folks.

entry.title: Is there a way to capture snapshots of SM51 by writing an SAP Script for it?
entry.content:
Hi.

Is it possible to write an SAP Script that captures Snapshot of SM51 (Running Application) and schedule that to run every 30 minutes? If yes, how I make it work?

Thanks,
Appreciate the help. 🙂

entry.title: Is there a way to restrict user login for specific period and implement on the weekly basis?
entry.content:
Hi..

I want to restrict user login for 1 or 2 days a week and implement this on a weekly basis. So, is there a way to do this? If yes how?

Thanks in Advance. 🙂

entry.title: User Defined Search in SAP ABAP Monitoring: SXMB_MONI for Synch messages
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
I am trying to setup a used defined search criteria for synch message in S4 side. But, it is not working when executed from SXMB_MONI and working only when tested in the test search criteria.
Here are some links for this configuration -

https://lessonslearnedsap.wordpress.com/2017/07/28/user-defined-selection-criteria-on-abap-stack-in-sxi_monitor/

https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw73ehp1/7.31.19/en-us/48/c85598f63335bfe10000000a42189d/content.htm?no_cache=true

Thanks

Sugata

entry.title: When I use BDC TO CALL TRANSACTION VA05,There are NO data return in internal table：lt_message
entry.content:
My code are as follow：
  DATA: ctu_parameters TYPE ctu_params.
  ctu_parameters-dismode = 'N'.  "后台更新模式
  ctu_parameters-updmode = 'S'.  "同步更新
  ctu_parameters-racommit = 'X'. "No abortion by COMMIT WORK 
CALL TRANSACTION 'VA05' USING bdcdata[] OPTIONS FROM ctu_parameters
     MESSAGES INTO lt_message .

And then i change the code as follow，It still doesn't take effect
 *  DATA: ctu_parameters TYPE ctu_params.
*  ctu_parameters-dismode = 'N'.  "后台更新模式
*  ctu_parameters-updmode = 'L'.  "后台更新
*  ctu_parameters-defsize = 'X'.  "默认大小
*  ctu_parameters-racommit = 'X'. "No abortion by COMMIT WORK
*  ctu_parameters-nobinpt = 'X'. "批输入处理活动
*  ctu_parameters-nobiend = 'X'. "批输入处理活动

entry.title: how can i see connectivity to other system?
entry.content:
I have a complex landscape where 4Hana, BW, CRM MDG are all interconnected.

Is there a single (or multiple) transaction that I can look into in order to see if connectivity works between those system?

Regards

entry.title: occurs obsolete abap
entry.content:
hi,

I need to create a table that takes a structure that I created in SE11.
I used the Occors command:

DATA: gt_test LIKE ZTEST OCCURS 1000.

what can I use instead of occurs?

thank you

entry.title: how to read RSTXT-TXLINE field
entry.content:
Hi,

inside the RIAFRU20 report enanchment I have to read the RSTXT-TXLINE field 

 

I have already tried the FM READ_TEXT but it wants the "Name" as input, I don't know the "Name" inside the enhancement 

how can i do?

entry.title: How to append an existing custom structure to a standard table
entry.content:
Hi,

I created a custom structure and I need to add it in append inside a standard table.

but if I click the "Append structure" button it tells me that the structure already exists:

I don't want to create the structure, because it already exists, but I just need to add it to the standard table. How can I do that?

 

thank you

entry.title: how to read fields of structures
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

inside a custom report, I need to read some fields that are present in these structures:

 

AFVGD
AFRUD
CAUFVD
VIQMFE
RIWO00
VIQMUR

 

since they are structures, I can't do a Select, are there tables that I can use that are connected to these structures? Or are there Function Modules?


Thank you!

entry.title: Get the data from RFC BAPI Result
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

The third-party application is sending data to SAP Standard RFC BAPI parameter, then the BAPI will prepare a data then extract it / send it to third party application

My question is how to view the RFC BAPI received data and sent to third party application without any code modification? is there a log history of data received/sent in SAP or tcode I can use to view the received/sent data?


Like for example: these BAPI parameters was sent to third party application yesterday after a week I want to review/check the data sent to third party application

entry.title: SAP XI/PI excel to custom RFC
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

in my old custom RFC there are 3 import parameters ( IV_NAME, IV_AGE, IV_ADDRESS )

Existing

FieldIV_NAMEIV_AgeIV_Address
ValueNAME118Canada

need to add

FieldIV_CITY
ValueCITY1

in the XI/PO mapping the parameter is ( IV_NAME, IV_AGE, IV_ADDRESS )

In the new requirement we need to add and get the City from file created from XI/PO, I already adjusted the custom RFC and added the IV_CITY and the XI/PO team also added the new parameter IV_CITY to the mapping. while doing debugging, I checked the import parameter in the RFC and saw that the RFC did not receive the City value, what could be the cause of the issue?

entry.title: How to determine the RFC type
entry.content: Hello, how to determine the RFC type currently used in the system if it is Asynchronous, Synchronous, etc. Which tcode should i check?

entry.title: Passing data from one session to another session
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to pass data from one LUW to another in my SAP system. Initially, I tried using Memory ID, but I encountered issues when multiple sessions attempted to update the same Memory ID simultaneously.

In my system, Shared Memory is not allowed, so I am exploring other options. I am considering using a persistence mechanism, but I don’t want to create a custom Z table to store the data.

Is there a way to achieve this using standard SAP features, such as persistent objects, temporary cluster tables, or any other alternatives?

Thanks in advance for your suggestions!
